mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POLICY_DEPLOY_LOG ( deploy_id, policy_id, previous_policy_id, action, reason, actor_id, deployed_at ) VALUES ( #{deployId}, #{policyId}, #{previousPolicyId}, #{action}, #{reason}, #{actorId}, #{deployedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT deploy_id AS deployId, policy_id AS policyId, previous_policy_id AS previousPolicyId, action, reason, actor_id AS actorId, deployed_at AS deployedAt FROM POLICY_DEPLOY_LOG WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} ORDER BY deployed_at DESC, deploy_id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT deploy_id AS deployId, policy_id AS policyId, previous_policy_id AS previousPolicyId, action, reason, actor_id AS actorId, deployed_at AS deployedAt FROM POLICY_DEPLOY_LOG WHERE policy_id = #{policyId} ORDER BY deployed_at DESC, deploy_id DESC
